abilities.name: Wyrd Scythes
abilities.description: Wyrd Scythes surround Dagath and seek out nearby enemies. Those struck are slowed and suffer <DT_VIRAL_COLOR>Viral Damage with a guaranteed Status Effect. The scythes also spread Doom and extend its duration.

abilities.name: Doom
abilities.description: Condemn nearby enemies to their doom. A portion of the damage Dagath deals is revisited upon them by a Wyrd Scythe. They also suffer <DT_VIRAL_COLOR>Viral Damage.

abilities.name: Grave Spirit
abilities.description: Supercharge Dagath’s weapons with extra Critical Damage. The effects are doubled on Doomed enemies. Escape fatal blows by briefly assuming a spectral form.

abilities.name: Rakhali's Cavalry
abilities.description: Phantom Kaithes charge forth, inflicting <DT_VIRAL_COLOR>Viral Damage upon all in their path. Their attack strips the defenses of Doomed enemies.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Pagemaster/Pagemaster.name: Dante
/Lotus/Powersuits/Pagemaster/Pagemaster.passiveDescription: Noctua scans targets, recording information for your Codex. Status Chance increases by |CHANCE|% on fully scanned targets.

abilities.name: Noctua

abilities.name: Light Verse

abilities.name: Dark Verse
abilities.description: Dante's composition draws blood from nearby enemies, inflicting <DT_SLASH_COLOR>Slash Damage upon them.

abilities.name: Final Verse
abilities.description:
Dante must compose two other Verses before his Final Verse. TRIUMPH: Two Light Verses cast in succession invigorate allies with a buff that increases Health and grants Overguard. Kills and assists briefly regenerate Overguard.
Dante must compose two other Verses before his Final Verse. TRAGEDY: Two Dark Verses cast in succession attack enemies. Damage Over Time from Slash, Heat and Toxin Status Effects accumulates in a single blast.

abilities.name: Inferno

abilities.name: Avalanche

abilities.name: Tentacle Swarm
abilities.description: Summon a creature from the depths. Its watery tentacles emerge from nearby surfaces to wreak havoc.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Sandman/Sandman.name: Inaros
/Lotus/Powersuits/Sandman/Sandman.passiveDescription: When Inaros takes lethal damage, he entombs himself in a sarcophagus and incarnates as sand to attack enemies, draining their lifeforce to revive himself.

abilities.name: Desiccation
abilities.description: Blast enemies with a wave of cursed sand that blinds them and steals their health.

abilities.name: Sandstorm
abilities.description: Become a sandstorm. Inaros devours enemies pulled into his whirlwind, healing himself.

abilities.name: Scarab Shell
abilities.description: Activate to form Armor by draining Inaros' Health. Activate again to stop the formation early. The protective layer reduces incoming Damage and absorbs Status Effects.

abilities.name: Scarab Swarm
abilities.description: Summon a Scarab Swarm to attack enemies with guaranteed <DT_CORROSIVE_COLOR>Corrosive Status. Damage scales with Inaros' Health. Enemies killed while immersed in the swarm summon a Swarm Kavat that fights alongside Inaros and guides the scarabs to other enemies.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Sandman/InarosPrime.name: Inaros Prime
/Lotus/Powersuits/Sandman/InarosPrime.passiveDescription: When Inaros takes lethal damage, he entombs himself in a sarcophagus and incarnates as sand to attack enemies, draining their lifeforce to revive himself.

abilities.name: Quiver
abilities.description: Cycle through and shoot one of four tactical arrows. Cloak creates a stationary bubble that cloaks Ivara and allies. Dashwire creates a traversable zipline. Noise emits a high-pitched sound that attracts enemies to it. Sleep temporarily puts nearby enemies into a deep slumber.

abilities.name: Navigator
abilities.description: Assume control of any projectile launched by Ivara and guide it to the target.

abilities.name: Prowl
abilities.description: Become invisible and steal loot from unsuspecting enemies or take out prey with deadly headshots.

abilities.name: Artemis Bow
abilities.description: Summon a mighty bow and unleash a volley of devastating arrows.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Choir/Choir.name: Jade
/Lotus/Powersuits/Choir/Choir.passiveDescription: Jade's profound understanding of the relationship between life and death grants her two Aura Mod Slots. Some of her Abilities apply Judgments, increasing enemy damage vulnerability by |CHANCE|% for |DURATION|s.

abilities.name: Light's Judgment
abilities.description: Create a well of light that heals allies and hurts enemies. Those who enter the well will be highlighted by Judgments.

abilities.name: Symphony Of Mercy
abilities.description: Cycle through three songs that strengthen allies. Power of The Seven increases Ability Strength. Deathbringer increases Weapon Damage. Spirit of Resilience increases Shield Effectiveness. Extend the duration of each song by killing enemies surrounded by Judgments.

abilities.name: Ophanim Eyes
abilities.description: Jade summons an accusatory gaze that slows nearby enemies and dissolves their Shields and Armor. When the gaze falls upon allies, they can be revived from a distance.

abilities.name: Glory On High
abilities.description: Soar with destructive power. Use alternate-fire to detonate Judgments, causing an explosion of Jade Light. Enemies inside the Light's Judgment radius empower the explosion.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Khora/Khora.name: Khora
/Lotus/Powersuits/Khora/Khora.passiveDescription: The ferocious kavat, Venari, fights by Khora's side and provides her with a |SPEED|% speed boost while active. If killed, Venari will reappear after |RESPAWN|s.

abilities.name: Whipclaw
abilities.description: Send enemies reeling with a deafening whipcrack. Stats are boosted by the equipped mods on Whipclaw.

abilities.name: Ensnare
abilities.description: Bind a hapless target in living metal, entangling others who stray too close. Whipclaw will refresh the trap allowing it to capture more enemies.

abilities.name: Venari
abilities.description: Command Venari to focus on a target. Hold to cycle between Attack, Protect, and Heal postures. If Venari is killed, use this ability to revive her instantly.

abilities.name: Strangledome
abilities.description: Weave a dome of living chain that ensnares and strangles any enemy within, and any foolish enough to approach. Foes outside the trap will try to hasten their comrade's deaths by shooting them. Crack Whipclaw on the dome to further damage any trapped enemies.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Khora/KhoraPrime.name: Khora Prime
/Lotus/Powersuits/Khora/KhoraPrime.passiveDescription: The ferocious kavat, Venari, fights by Khora's side and provides her with a |SPEED|% speed boost while active. If killed, Venari will reappear after |RESPAWN|s.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Koumei/Koumei.name: Koumei
/Lotus/Powersuits/Koumei/Koumei.passiveDescription: Every |DURATION| seconds, one of Koumei's weapons will inflict random Status Effects for |DURATION| seconds.

abilities.name: Kumihimo
abilities.description:
Weave the threads of destiny. Enemies who touch the threads suffer a random Elemental Status Effect.

A roll of triple sixes creates threads that inflict one of every Elemental Status Effect.

abilities.name: Omikuji
abilities.description:
Koumei glimpses a favorable future and the precise steps needed to reach it. Complete the challenge to earn a Decree. Unlucky rolls add a debuff, but you can hold the ability to reject the Omikuji.

A roll of triple sixes grants a Decree without a challenge.

abilities.name: Omamori
abilities.description:
Surround yourself with Omamori Charms, each with a chance to have enemy attacks heal you instead of damage you. The number of charms is determined by Koumei’s dice roll.

A roll of triple sixes grants invulnerability for the duration of your Omamori Charms.

abilities.name: Bunraku
abilities.description:
Wield your foe’s fate threads like the strings of marionettes. Koumei’s dice determine how many Status Effects foes in front of Koumei will suffer.

A roll of triple sixes causes further Status Effects over time and extends Bunraku to enemies behind Koumei.

/Lotus/Powersuits/PaxDuviricus/PaxDuviri.name: Kullervo
/Lotus/Powersuits/PaxDuviricus/PaxDuviri.passiveDescription: Kullervo boasts +|EFFICIENCY|% Heavy Attack Efficiency and +|WINDUP|% Heavy Attack Wind Up Speed on all melee weapons.

abilities.name: Wrathful Advance
abilities.description:
(TAP) Kullervo charges a Heavy Attack, then teleports to his target and strikes. His rage-filled focus temporarily increases his Melee Critical Chance.
(HOLD) Teleport to any marked location.

abilities.name: Recompense
abilities.description: Kullervo surrounds himself with daggers. Each dagger that strikes an enemy restores his health, but each dagger that misses an enemy strikes Kullervo, dealing a bit of damage. When Kullervo has max Health, he receives Overguard from struck enemies.

abilities.name: Collective Curse
abilities.description: Kullervo sends forth a curse that binds enemies. When a cursed enemy takes damage from him, every other cursed enemy also suffers a portion of that damage.

abilities.name: Storm Of Ukko
abilities.description: The Void answers Kullervo's invocation with a storm of daggers that rain down upon his enemies.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Alchemist/Alchemist.name: Lavos
/Lotus/Powersuits/Alchemist/Alchemist.passiveDescription:
Energy and Universal Orbs give Lavos status immunity for |DURATION|s.

Hold any ability to imbue the next cast with additional Elemental Damage and Status.

abilities.name: Ophidian Bite
abilities.description:
Lash out with a toxic serpentine strike, consuming the target to heal Lavos.

Hold to imbue all abilities with <DT_POISON_COLOR>Toxin.

abilities.name: Vial Rush
abilities.description:
Dash forward, crashing through enemies and leaving an icy trail of broken vials.

Hold to imbue the next ability cast with <DT_FREEZE_COLOR>Cold.

abilities.name: Transmutation Probe
abilities.description:
Launch a probe that converts Health and Energy Orbs into Universal Orbs that provide both, and ammo pickups into Universal Ammo Pickups. The probe shocks enemies in close proximity. Each electrocuted foe reduces other ability cooldowns by 1.5s.

Hold to imbue the next ability cast with <DT_ELECTRICITY_COLOR>Electricity.

abilities.name: Catalyze
abilities.description:
Catalyst Probes erupt from Lavos and douse combatants in a fiery gel. Damage is doubled for each element afflicting an enemy.

Hold to imbue the next ability cast with <DT_FIRE_COLOR>Heat.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Alchemist/LavosPrime.name: Lavos Prime
/Lotus/Powersuits/Alchemist/LavosPrime.passiveDescription:

/Lotus/Powersuits/Magician/Magician.name: Limbo
/Lotus/Powersuits/Magician/Magician.passiveDescription: Dodge to enter and exit the Rift. Entering leaves behind a small Rift portal lasting |DURATION|s. Energy slowly recharges in the Rift, and each enemy killed in there also gives |ENERGY| Energy.

abilities.name: Banish
abilities.description: Casts a wave of Rift energy that damages hostiles while pushing enemies and allies out of Limbo's current plane of existence.

abilities.name: Stasis
abilities.description: Freezes Rift-bound enemies. While active, enemy projectiles are arrested in mid-air, resuming its trajectory when stasis ends.

abilities.name: Rift Surge
abilities.description: Surges nearby Rift-bound enemies with Rift energy. When killed the Rift Surge is transferred to a nearby enemy outside the rift. Surged enemies that leave the Rift perform a radial Banish.

abilities.name: Cataclysm
abilities.description: A violent blast of Void energy tears open a pocket of rift plane which can sustain itself for a short period before collapsing in another lethal blast.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Magician/LimboPrime.name: Limbo Prime
/Lotus/Powersuits/Magician/LimboPrime.passiveDescription: Dodge to enter and exit the Rift. Entering leaves behind a small Rift portal lasting |DURATION|s. Energy slowly recharges in the Rift, and each enemy killed in there also gives |ENERGY| Energy.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Loki/Loki.name: Loki
/Lotus/Powersuits/Loki/Loki.passiveDescription: Able to hang from walls |MULT|x longer than normal.

abilities.name: Decoy
abilities.description: Loki deploys a holographic copy of himself that draws enemy fire and absorbs a portion of nearby enemy health and shields.

abilities.name: Invisibility
abilities.description: Loki camouflages himself, becoming invisible to enemies.

abilities.name: Switch Teleport
abilities.description: Loki instantaneously swaps positions with a target, confusing the enemy.

abilities.name: Radial Disarm
abilities.description: Lets forth a wave of energy, disrupting the projectile weapons of enemies in range and forcing them to revert to melee combat.

abilities.name: Pull
abilities.description: Mag stuns enemies as she manifests a magnetic vortex. The vortex pulls in Polarize Shards and stunned enemies to place them directly in front of her.

abilities.name: Magnetize
abilities.description:
(TAP) Enclose a target in a magnetic field that ensnares nearby enemies and deals damage over time. The field pulls Polarize Shards that orbited Mag and shrapnel into the deadly mix.
(HOLD) Mag surrounds herself in a magnetic field that absorbs ranged attacks and reflects damage back in a destructive cone.

abilities.name: Polarize
abilities.description: Emit an energy pulse that depletes enemy shields and armor as it restores ally shields. Debris left over from the pulse becomes Polarize Shards. Nearby Polarize Shards orbit Mag and cut enemies, inflicting <DT_SLASH_COLOR>Slash Status Effect.

abilities.name: Crush
abilities.description: Magnetize the bones of nearby enemies, causing them to collapse upon themselves.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Cowgirl/Cowgirl.passiveDescription: Shoot dual-wielded sidearms |SPEED|% faster and reload single-handed sidearms |RELOAD|% more rapidly. Gain |HEALTH| Bonus Health when not using Melee Weapons.

abilities.name: Ballistic Battery
abilities.description: When activated, this power stores damage caused by guns. When triggered again, that damage is channelled through the next gunshot.

abilities.name: Shooting Gallery
abilities.description: Gives an ally Extra Damage while jamming the guns of nearby enemies. This power shifts between team members.

abilities.name: Shatter Shield
abilities.description: Envelops Mesa in a barrier of energy, reflecting back incoming bullet damage.

abilities.name: Peacemaker
abilities.description: With intense focus, Mesa draws her Regulator pistols, shooting down her foes in rapid succession.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Cowgirl/MesaPrime.name: Mesa Prime
/Lotus/Powersuits/Cowgirl/MesaPrime.passiveDescription: Shoot dual-wielded sidearms |SPEED|% faster and reload single-handed sidearms |RELOAD|% more rapidly. Gain |HEALTH| Bonus Health when not using Melee Weapons.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Harlequin/Harlequin.name: Mirage
/Lotus/Powersuits/Harlequin/Harlequin.passiveDescription: Sliding lasts |DURATION|% longer and acrobatic maneuvers are |SPEED|% faster.

abilities.name: Hall Of Mirrors
abilities.description: Mirage creates an entourage of doppelgangers to confuse and distract the enemy.

abilities.name: Sleight Of Hand
abilities.description: Booby trap nearby objects while conjuring an irresistible jewel that bursts with radial blind when touched in darkness, or a radial explosion in light. Conjure multiple smaller jewels with the help of Hall of Mirrors.

abilities.name: Eclipse
abilities.description:
(TAP) Temporarily reduce the damage Mirage takes from enemies.
(HOLD) Temporarily increase Mirage's weapon damage.

abilities.name: Prism
abilities.description: Fires an energy prism that shoots lasers in all directions. Activating again detonates the prism, blinding nearby foes.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Necro/Necro.passiveDescription: Restore |HEALTH| Health with every enemy death within |RADIUS|m.

abilities.name: Soul Punch
abilities.description: A blow so powerful, it turns the enemy's very soul into a deadly projectile, damaging all in its path. Enemies that survive the blow are Marked for Harvest and become one of Nekros' Shadows of the Dead if killed while marked.

abilities.name: Terrify
abilities.description: Cast fear into the hearts of nearby enemies, causing them to run away in terror.

abilities.name: Desecrate
abilities.description: Forces fallen enemies around you to drop additional loot.

abilities.name: Shadows Of The Dead
abilities.description: Summon shadow versions of vanquished enemies to fight alongside you for a short period.

abilities.name: Blazing Chakram
abilities.description: Hurl a flaming ring that sets enemies ablaze making them vulnerable to any damage. Flaming enemies drop Restorative Orbs on death. Charge to amplify the power of the ring, and reactivate to instantly travel to the ring's location.

abilities.name: Warding Halo
abilities.description: Create a protective ring of fire, that also stuns and damages enemies who get too close.

abilities.name: Divine Spears
abilities.description: Impale nearby enemies on spears that erupt from the below. Activate again to slam surviving enemies back into the ground.

abilities.name: Virulence
abilities.description: Rupture the ground with a damaging fungal growth that steals energy from each enemy it strikes. For every five enemies hit, the Infestation mutates, multiplying its destructive force.

abilities.name: Larva
abilities.description: Spawn an Infested pod that erupts with tendrils, latches onto nearby enemies and pulls them in. Enemies killed while held have a chance of generating a Mutation stack.

abilities.name: Parasitic Link
abilities.description: Bind to a target with parasitic link. When cast on an ally, both the host and Nidus have their Ability Strength increased. Linked enemies take some of the damage inflicted on Nidus.

abilities.name: Ravenous
abilities.description: Gluttonous maggots swarm nearby enemies, feasting until they are hit with Virulence and burst with Infestation. The maggots benefit from Mutation and each enemy hit adds to the Mutation stack.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Nokko/Nokko.passiveDescription: Upon receiving fatal damage, Nokko reverts to his Sprodling form and his active mushrooms will glow, reviving Nokko when touched. Orbs spawned will grant a speed boost but not healing. If a glowing mushroom is not reached in time, Nokko will automatically use a self-revive.

abilities.name: Stinkbrain
abilities.description: Throw a mushroom that periodically sheds poisonous spores, inflicting <DT_VIRAL_COLOR> Viral Damage and Status Effect upon nearby enemies while also lulling them to sleep.

abilities.name: Brightbonnet
abilities.description: Release a rejuvenating mushroom that emits a radial pulse, giving Nokko and his allies' <ENERGY> Energy and applying a buff to Ability Strength that lasts for a short time.

abilities.name: Reroot
abilities.description: Revert to Sprodling form, spawning orbs that heal Nokko and grant a speed boost. While in this state, Nokko is untargetable and heals gradually.

abilities.name: Sporespring
abilities.description: Unleash a chaotic ballistic mushroom that seeks enemies and bounces explosively off whatever it touches. Contact with any of Nokko’s mushrooms invigorates them, doubling their pulse rate.

/Lotus/Powersuits/AntiMatter/Anti.passiveDescription: Enemies killed while slowed down have |CHANCE|% to drop health orbs. Enemies killed while sped up have |CHANCE|% to drop energy orbs.

abilities.description: Creates antimatter particles that orbit Nova and attack nearby targets. Each active particle reduces damage to Nova's Health and Shields.

abilities.name: Antimatter Drop
abilities.description: Launch a large particle of charged antimatter that will detonate on contact. Direct the particle by aiming, shoot it to charge it further. Deals <DT_EXPLOSION_COLOR>Blast Damage with a guaranteed Status Effect.

abilities.name: Wormhole
abilities.description: Creates a wormhole allowing instantaneous travel. Hold the ability to visualize placement.

abilities.name: Molecular Prime
abilities.description: Primes all enemies in an expanding radius with volatile antimatter. Press the ability to slow down enemy movement, hold the ability to speed them up.

abilities.description: Creates a wormhole allowing instantaneous travel. Hold the ability to visualize placement.

abilities.name: Molecular Prime
abilities.description: Primes all enemies in an expanding radius with volatile antimatter. Press the ability to slow down enemy movement, hold the ability to speed them up.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Jade/Jade.name: Nyx
/Lotus/Powersuits/Jade/Jade.passiveDescription: Nyx gains +|CRITICAL|% Critical Chance on Primary and Secondary weapons per Confused enemy within <AFFINITY_SHARE>Affinity Range, up to +|MAX|%.

abilities.name: Mind Control
abilities.description: Nyx seizes control of a target's mind, compelling them to fight for the Tenno cause. Controlled enemies have increased <DT_RADIATION_COLOR>Radiation Status Chance. When Nyx shoots them, they also have an increased Damage Multiplier.

abilities.name: Psychic Bolts
abilities.description: Nyx unleashes a volley of psychic bolts that track and strike nearby enemies with telekinetic precision. When enemies are slain, additional bolts scatter to new targets. Striking foes weakens their defenses and transfers a portion to Nyx.

abilities.name: Chaos
abilities.description: Nyx releases a devastating psychic pulse, disorienting enemies in a wide radius and forcing them to turn on each other. Confused foes lash out at random factions.

abilities.name: Absorb
abilities.description: Nyx draws in and contains the damage dealt to her and the damage confused enemies deal to each other then converts it into a devastating radial blast. Following the blast, she enters a brief invulnerable state and gains a Weapon Damage boost proportional to the absorbed damage.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Jade/NyxPrime.passiveDescription: Nyx gains +|CRITICAL|% Critical Chance on Primary and Secondary weapons per Confused enemy within <AFFINITY_SHARE>Affinity Range, up to +|MAX|%.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Paladin/Paladin.name: Oberon
/Lotus/Powersuits/Paladin/Paladin.passiveDescription: Oberon grants Righteous Negation to himself and his allies in <AFFINITY_SHARE>Affinity Range when he collects <HEALTH>Health Orbs, protecting players against the next instance of damage. Stacks up to |STACKS| times.

abilities.name: Smite
abilities.description: Focuses deadly energy within a target, dealing massive damage and removing all of its defenses, including Overguard. Enemies near the target also take a portion of the damage.

abilities.name: Hallowed Ground
abilities.description: Sanctifies the ground around Oberon, inflicting <DT_RADIATION_COLOR>Radiation Damage to all enemies within the radius. Also grants protection against Status Effects for Oberon and his allies.

abilities.name: Renewal
abilities.description: Generates a protective aura that grants bonus Armor to Oberon and his allies and restores allies’ Health over time. Healing is doubled while within the radius of Hallowed Ground.

abilities.name: Reckoning
abilities.description: Lifts enemies into the air and then hurls them down with conviction, removing their Armor. Enemies hit by this ability will grant Oberon additional Armor and have a chance to spawn a <HEALTH>Health Orb when they die.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Bard/Bard.name: Octavia
/Lotus/Powersuits/Bard/Bard.passiveDescription: Replenish |ENERGY| energy over |DURATION|s for Octavia and allies within |RANGE|m when abilities are activated.

abilities.name: Mallet
abilities.description: Rhythmically beats damage into nearby enemies and draws their fire. Damage inflicted on the Mallet increases its lethality.

abilities.name: Resonator
abilities.description: Launches a rollerball that charms foes to follow it. Combines with the Mallet to create a roving ball of sonic destruction.

abilities.name: Metronome
abilities.description: Grants buffs to those who consistently perform actions in time to Octavia's music. Timed jumps offer the Vivace speed buff. Crouching on the beat grants cloaking with the Nocturne buff. Firing rhythmically bestows Opera multishot buff. Timed melee swings give the Forte damage buff.

abilities.name: Amp
abilities.description: Draws power from the decibel level of sound in the area and uses it to amplify a damage buff for Octavia and her allies. It also doubles the damage and range of nearby Mallets.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Oraxia/Oraxia.passiveDescription: Wall Latching grants Predator's Lurk, rendering Oraxia invisible for |DURATION|s.

abilities.name: Mercy's Kiss
abilities.description: Leap onto an enemy and pierce them with Oraxia’s spider legs, dealing <DT_POISON_COLOR>Toxin Damage. Enemies defeated by this attack have a chance to drop Health or Energy Orbs.

abilities.name: Webbed Embrace
abilities.description: Oraxia throws a creeping web to ensnare her prey. Enemies caught within the widening radius are trapped inside a cocoon that increases their Damage Vulnerability.

abilities.name: Widow's Brood
abilities.description: Oraxia launches a barrage of stinging darts in front of her that applies <DT_POISON_COLOR> Toxin Status Effect. Poisoned enemies spawn Scuttlers when killed.

abilities.name: Silken Stride
abilities.description:
Unfurl Oraxia's spider legs and go on the prowl. Oraxia is immune to Status Effects and has increased Maximum Health. Ranged Weapons are imbued with <DT_POISON_COLOR> Toxin Damage. Killing enemies causes them to burst with <DT_POISON_COLOR>Toxin.

Silken Thread: Tap Dodge to leap to a targeted surface.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Odalisk/Odalisk.name: Protea
/Lotus/Powersuits/Odalisk/Odalisk.passiveDescription: Every |CASTS|th Power Cast is granted +|STRENGTH|% Ability Strength.

abilities.name: Grenade Fan
abilities.description:
Throw out grenades in an arc.

(TAP) SHRAPNEL VORTEX
Creates a slashing, staggering swirl of shrapnel.

(HOLD) SHIELD SATELLITES
Protea reconfigures Grenades to work as overcharging shield generators, protecting her, her allies and companions. When Shields break, a Satellite is destroyed to double minimum Shield Gate invincibility time.

abilities.name: Blaze Artillery
abilities.description: Deploys an artillery unit to blast plasma charges at enemies it faces. Each enemy hit increases the power of subsequent plasma attacks.

abilities.name: Dispensary
abilities.description: Deploys a device that generates 3 pickups after a short delay: empowered health orb, universal ammo pack and energy orb.

abilities.name: Temporal Anchor
abilities.description:
Drops a Temporal Anchor which, after a short duration, Protea rewinds to trigger a temporal implosion. Implosion damage increases based on damage dealt between anchor drop and rewind. Everything lost or expended in that time is returned.
Dying while Anchor is active rewinds Protea to the anchor, saving her. Protea is knocked down and the anchor vanishes.

/Lotus/Powersuits/ConcreteFrame/Concrete.name: Qorvex
/Lotus/Powersuits/ConcreteFrame/Concrete.passiveDescription: Weapons wielded by Qorvex have an additional +|PUNCH_THROUGH| Punch Through.

abilities.name: Chyrinka Pillar
abilities.description: Summon a Chyrinka Pillar that slows enemies. It pulses <DT_RADIATION_COLOR>Radiation Damage with a guaranteed Status Effect.

abilities.name: Containment Wall
abilities.description: Contain the threat. Qorvex summons walls that slam together, damaging all enemies caught between them and inflicting <DT_RADIATION_COLOR>Radiation Status.

abilities.name: Disometric Guard
abilities.description: Guard yourself and nearby allies against Status Effects. Each time Qorvex kills or assists in killing an enemy affected by <DT_RADIATION_COLOR>Radiation Status, the number of Status Effects Disometric Guard can prevent increases.

abilities.name: Crucible Blast
abilities.description: Release a beam from Qorvex's Crucible Core. Each enemy struck suffers <DT_RADIATION_COLOR>Radiation Damage with a guaranteed Status Effect. Enemies affected by <DT_RADIATION_COLOR>Radiation Status explode in a chain reaction.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Revenant/Revenant.name: Revenant
/Lotus/Powersuits/Revenant/Revenant.passiveDescription: Shield depletion smashes enemies within |RADIUS|m with a |DAMAGE| Damage knockdown shockwave.

abilities.name: Enthrall
abilities.description: Convert a target into a zealous thrall. Thralls turn on their allies and enthrall through damage. On death, they disintegrate into a damaging pillar of energy. The thrall horde remains under Revenants spell until this ability runs out.

abilities.name: Mesmer Skin
abilities.description: Become enveloped in Sentient energy, redirecting damage and stunning all those who dare attack. Stunned enemies can be Enthralled at no energy cost.

abilities.name: Reave
abilities.description: Dash through enemies as a wall of sentient energy, leeching shields and health from any encountered, enhanced for thralls.

abilities.name: Danse Macabre
abilities.description: Erupt with a multitude of Eidolon energy beams and sweep a circle of death around Revenant. The beams will modify their Damage Type to target select defenses, while incoming damage is redirected back into the beams. Hold fire to boost Status Effects and Damage, at the cost of increased energy consumption. Thralls killed by this ability leave overshield pickups.

abilities.name: Rhino Charge
abilities.description: Rhino charges towards a target, clobbering any in his path and goring his victim.

abilities.name: Iron Skin
abilities.description: Rhino hardens his skin, insulating himself from all damage and gaining Overguard.

abilities.name: Roar
abilities.description: Grants all nearby Warframes increased damage for a short duration.

abilities.name: Rhino Stomp
abilities.description: Rhino stomps with force sufficient to disrupt time, tumbling enemies around him in stasis.

abilities.name: Spores
abilities.description: Inflict a target with a pox of <DT_CORROSIVE_COLOR>Corrosive spores. Spread spores to nearby enemies by destroying them or killing their host. The longer the Spore spreads, its damage will increase.

abilities.name: Molt
abilities.description: Shedding her skin like a snake, Saryn leaves a decoy behind to draw fire from enemies.

abilities.name: Toxic Lash
abilities.description: While active, attacks deal additional <DT_POISON_COLOR>Toxin Damage; this effect is doubled for Melee Strikes. Instantly burst spores when attacking afflicted enemies.

abilities.name: Miasma
abilities.description: Release a poisonous miasma that deals <DT_VIRAL_COLOR>Viral Damage to enemies in range. Foes afflicted by spores are more susceptible to the mist.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Wraith/Wraith.passiveDescription: On death, become Sevagoth's Shadow and fight to resurrect him by collecting the souls needed to rebuild his tombstone.

abilities.name: Reap
abilities.description: Sevagoth's Shadow flies outward ravaging enemies in his path. Survivors are damaged by Death’s Harvest over time. The souls of the dead fill the Death Well.

abilities.name: Sow
abilities.description: Plant a death seed in nearby targets to drain their lifeforce. Reap what has been sown to detonate afflicted enemies, dealing a percentage of their health as radial damage. The souls of the dead fill the Death Well.

abilities.name: Gloom
abilities.description: Summon a radial pulse wave that ensnares and slows enemies, siphoning their lifeforce for the Death Well. Allies within the wave steal health with each attack.

abilities.name: Exalted Shadow
abilities.description: When the Death Well fills, Sevagoth's Shadow form is ready to be released. Tear the enemy asunder with a collection of melee-focused abilities.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Wraith/SevagothPrime.name: Sevagoth Prime

/Lotus/Powersuits/Hoplite/Hoplite.passiveDescription: Styanax's critical chance increases with his shields and doubles for spearguns.

abilities.name: Axios Javelin
abilities.description: Throw an Axios Javelin. When the javelin impales an enemy against a wall, surrounding enemies are pulled into the area and suffer a burst of damage.

abilities.name: Tharros Strike
abilities.description: Summon Tharros, the shield of Styanax. Swing Tharros to repel enemies and reduce their shields and armor. Styanax regenerates health for every enemy struck.

abilities.name: Rally Point
abilities.description: Draw enemy attention to Styanax. His resolve uplifts him and nearby allies, regenerating the squad's energy over time. Styanax and his allies also regenerate shields for every kill assist they contribute.

abilities.name: Final Stand
abilities.description: Exude might and valor. Rise into the air and throw a barrage of Axios Javelins. The javelins deal damage to nearby enemies wherever they land. Direct hits to enemies deal greater damage.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Temple/Temple.name: Temple
/Lotus/Powersuits/Temple/Temple.passiveDescription: Play abilities in sync with the Backbeat metronome to invigorate ability effects while increasing Ability Efficiency by |COST|%.

abilities.name: Pyrotechnics
abilities.description:
Blast targeted enemies with pillars of <DT_FIRE_COLOR>Heat Damage. 

Backbeat Timing: Ignite even more pillars. Increases the Duration and <DT_FIRE_COLOR>Heat Damage of Ripper's Wail when it deals damage.

abilities.name: Overdrive
abilities.description:
Drive loudspeakers into epic distortion to create a damaging wave of <DT_FIRE_COLOR>Heat Damage while also increasing vulnerability to Critical Chance. 

Backbeat Timing: Doubles Critical Chance. Increases the Duration and <DT_FIRE_COLOR>Heat Damage of Ripper’s Wail when it deals damage.

abilities.name: Ripper's Wail
abilities.description:
Rip on the guitar to make Temple briefly invulnerable while healing them. Ally’s weapons in <AFFINITY_SHARE>Affinity Range are lit-up with extra <DT_FIRE_COLOR>Heat Damage each time an ability is used on the Backbeat and successfully hits enemies.

Backbeat Timing: Invulnerability lasts longer.

abilities.name: Exalted Solo
abilities.description:
Once a charge has been built up on the Backbeat metronome, set Lizzie aflame and torch enemies with <DT_FIRE_COLOR>Heat. While aimed, Lizzie blasts enemies with thunderous elemental sound waves, use ability controls to change the Elemental Damage type.

Backbeat Timing: No Energy consumed.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Fairy/Fairy.name: Titania
/Lotus/Powersuits/Fairy/Fairy.passiveDescription: Titania generates Health for herself and nearby allies every time she casts an Ability.

abilities.name: Spellbind
abilities.description: Enemies fumble their weapons as they are whisked into the air. Nearby allies become immune to Status Effects. Hold the ability to cast the immunity onto Titania.

abilities.name: Tribute
abilities.description: Cycle through and extract one of the four Buffs when cast on an enemy. Thorns reduces incoming damage. Dust degrades enemy accuracy. Full Moon increases companion damage. Entangle slows enemies within range.

abilities.name: Lantern
abilities.description: Create a swarm of razorflies that transform an enemy into an irresistible floating beacon, attracting witless comrades before exploding on command.

abilities.name: Razorwing
abilities.description: Shrink down and take flight, while razorflies attack nearby enemies and amplify the damage they take.

abilities.name: Link
abilities.description: Any damage taken while Link is active will be channeled to a nearby enemy.

abilities.name: Blessing

/Lotus/Powersuits/DemonFrame/DemonFrame.passiveDescription:
Uriel commands, empowers, and protects three unique demons.

CATENACH: Snares and slows enemies chaining them together. Damage dealt to any target in the chain is inflicted on all snared enemies. (Unlocks with Infernalis)

GULPHAGOR : Latches onto foes dealing damage over time. If killed, a circle of pain is spawned. (Unlocks with Remedium)

VYTHELAS: Inscribes demonic runes upon fallen foes that add Fire Rate and <DT_FIRE_COLOR>Heat Damage when collected. (Unlocks with Demonium)

abilities.name: Infernalis
abilities.description:
Manifest an aura of flames inflicting <DT_FIRE_COLOR>Heat Damage and Status Effect on nearby enemies.

Tap Dodge while airborne to take flight as a flaming meteor of destruction.

abilities.name: Remedium
abilities.description: Uriel heals himself and his demons. If his demons are dead, they are resurrected.

abilities.name: Demonium
abilities.description: Uriel rips out the souls of his demons, draining their health, and sends them in search of new victims. Souls explode on contact with an enemy, rendering it vulnerable to Damage.

abilities.name: Brimstone
abilities.description: Uriel and his demons create a growing ring of flaming brimstone. Charge the ability by utilizing demon abilities. Damage inflicted increases with each consecutive hit.

abilities.name: Warcry

abilities.name: Paralysis

abilities.name: Hysteria
abilities.description: Valkyr bares her deadly claws, unleashing devastating attacks that also heal her. Valkyr becomes immune to Status Effects and her Armor bonus from Warcry is multiplied while using the claws.

abilities.description: Unleash a damaging blast, slowing its victims while increasing their Melee Damage Vulnerability.

abilities.name: Hysteria
abilities.description: Valkyr bares her deadly claws, unleashing devastating attacks that also heal her. Valkyr becomes immune to Status Effects and her Armor bonus from Warcry is multiplied while using the claws.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Trapper/Trapper.name: Vauban
/Lotus/Powersuits/Trapper/Trapper.passiveDescription: Deal x|DAMAGE| Damage to incapacitated enemies.

abilities.name: Tesla Nervos
abilities.description: Deploy a roller drone that attaches itself to enemies and delivers bursts of arcing <DT_ELECTRICITY_COLOR> Electricity Damage to anything in the immediate area.

abilities.name: Minelayer
abilities.description:
Control the battlefield with masterful mines. Vauban's Tether-Flechette orb immobilizes and draws in enemies while launching deadly nails in all directions.

HOLD to launch a Vector-Overdrive pad that accelerates foes and allies alike in the pad's direction, increasing ally Movement Speed and Weapon Damage.

abilities.name: Photon Strike
abilities.description: Drop a targeting beacon that calls in a devastating laser artillery strike. Deals doubled damage to enemies with Overguard.

abilities.name: Bastille
abilities.description:
Erect a containment field to capture enemies and suspend them in stasis, stripping their armor and granting it to Vauban and any allies within Bastille's field.

HOLD to collapse all Bastilles into a single damaging vortex.

abilities.description: Hurl a canister of graviton fluids to create a wide mire that will significantly slow enemies traveling across it. Alternatively, the canister can be shot in mid-air to create a fiery conflagration.

abilities.name: Storm Shroud
abilities.description: Swathe the Necramech in a powerful electrical field that greatly enhances survivability in close combat. Enemies that strike the shroud will suffer for their impudence.

abilities.name: Gravemines
abilities.description: Launch a pattern of charged mines all around you. Each mine detonates in a violent blast when touched, damaging enemies in a three-meter radius.

abilities.name: Guard Mode
abilities.description: Take a stationary stance to deploy maximum firepower and gain increased structural integrity for a time.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Volt/Volt.name: Volt
/Lotus/Powersuits/Volt/Volt.passiveDescription: Grounded movement generates an electrical charge building up |DAMAGE| Damage per meter that is unleashed with the next attack.

abilities.name: Shock
abilities.description: Launch a voltaic projectile that stuns and damages its target. A chain of electricity extends from the target to shock nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Speed
abilities.description: Embody an electric current. Volt and his allies receive a brief movement speed boost and a reload speed buff.

abilities.name: Electric Shield
abilities.description:
Volt deploys an electric shield that blocks enemy fire and adds <DT_ELECTRICITY_COLOR>Electricity Damage to projectiles.
 
HOLD to equip the shield for mobile cover.

abilities.name: Discharge
abilities.description: Volt discharges the electricity that courses through him. The shockwave paralyzes and damages nearby enemies. Enemies on the edge of the shockwave are stunned.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Werewolf/Werewolf.name: Voruna
/Lotus/Powersuits/Werewolf/Werewolf.passiveDescription: Voruna never fights alone. In mission, hold Abilities to call upon each wolf’s unique Passive power.

abilities.name: Shroud Of Dynar
abilities.description:
(TAP) Dynar shrouds Voruna with invisibility and accelerates her speed. Invisibility ends when Voruna attacks. For a short time after invisibility ends, melee attacks have increased Critical Damage, Status Chance, Critical Chance and inflict <DT_SLASH_COLOR>Slash Status Effects. Melee kill an enemy during this time to extend the melee buff once per cast.

(HOLD) Dynar guards Voruna, increasing her Parkour Velocity.

abilities.name: Fangs Of Raksh
abilities.description:
(TAP) Raksh's fangs tear into your enemies. 5 random Status Effects are applied at 10 Stacks each on an enemy. On target's death, spread the Status Effects to other nearby enemies.

(HOLD) Raksh guards Voruna with Status Effect resistance.

abilities.name: Lycath's Hunt
abilities.description:
(TAP) Lycath hunts to sustain the pack. Enemies killed by melee attacks drop health orbs and enemies killed by headshots drop energy orbs. Increase the duration of Lycath’s hunt by killing enemies affected by 5 or more Status Effects.

(HOLD) Lycath guards Voruna with increased Heavy Attack efficiency.

abilities.name: Ulfrun's Descent
abilities.description:
(TAP) Voruna drops to all fours and prepares 5 brutal charges that lock onto enemies. Ulfrun, the most powerful wolf, leads the attack as Voruna dashes toward her target. The pack deals increased damage to targets and nearby enemies that are inflicted by Status Effects. Lethal attacks double the damage of Voruna's remaining charges.

(HOLD) Ulfrun guards Voruna. If Voruna falls during this time, Ulfrun dies in her place.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Werewolf/VorunaPrime.name: Voruna Prime
/Lotus/Powersuits/Werewolf/VorunaPrime.passiveDescription: Voruna never fights alone. In mission, hold Abilities to call upon each wolf’s unique Passive power.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Wisp/Wisp.name: Wisp
/Lotus/Powersuits/Wisp/Wisp.passiveDescription: Flowing between dimensions, Wisp becomes invisible to enemies while in the air.

abilities.name: Reservoirs
abilities.description: Choose and summon a Reservoir filled with Motes that attach to and aid Wisp and her allies. Haste Mote grants increased movement and attack speed. Vitality Mote increases maximum health and heals over time. Shock Mote stuns nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Wil-O-Wisp
abilities.description: Cast forward a spectral image of Wisp to confuse and distract enemies. Reactivate to travel to its position. Hold to have the image travel faster and teleport to its position on release.

abilities.name: Breach Surge
abilities.description:
Open a dimensional breach to overwhelm nearby enemies and cause them to release aggressive Surge sparks when damaged.
Wisp may also target a Reservoir to teleport to it and double the range of the surge.

abilities.name: Sol Gate
abilities.description: Open a portal to the sun to irradiate enemies with a devastating beam of pure solar plasma. Hold fire to double Damage at the cost of increased energy consumption. For the duration of an attack enemies damaged by Sol Gate are increasingly more vulnerable to it.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Wisp/WispPrime.name: Wisp Prime
/Lotus/Powersuits/Wisp/WispPrime.passiveDescription: Flowing between dimensions, Wisp becomes invisible to enemies while in the air.

/Lotus/Powersuits/MonkeyKing/MonkeyKing.name: Wukong
/Lotus/Powersuits/MonkeyKing/MonkeyKing.passiveDescription: After taking fatal damage Wukong automatically uses one of his mastered survival techniques. These techniques can only be invoked three times per mission.

abilities.name: Celestial Twin
abilities.description:
Shedding part of himself, Wukong creates a twin to fight by his side. Attack at range and the twin will melee, pull a blade and the twin will lay down covering fire.
Use again to command the twin to attack a target with increased damage.

abilities.name: Cloud Walker
abilities.description: Evaporate into a cloud of mist and float through the battlefield, dazing any enemies encountered, while healing Wukong and his twin.

abilities.name: Defy
abilities.description:
Wukong and his twin become invulnerable and defy enemies to attack. All damage is captured, stored, and dealt back in a single furious strike of Wukong's staff.
Bonus Armor is then granted relative to the damage captured.

abilities.name: Primal Fury
abilities.description: Summon the iron staff and unleash fury.

/Lotus/Powersuits/MonkeyKing/WukongPrime.name: Wukong Prime
/Lotus/Powersuits/MonkeyKing/WukongPrime.passiveDescription: After taking fatal damage Wukong automatically uses one of his mastered survival techniques. These techniques can only be invoked three times per mission.

/Lotus/Powersuits/BrokenFrame/BrokenFram.name: Xaku
/Lotus/Powersuits/BrokenFrame/BrokenFram.passiveDescription: |CHANCE|% Damage Reduction on AOE attacks and chance to avoid incoming weapon damage.

abilities.name: Xata's Whisper
abilities.description: Wield <DT_RADIANT_COLOR>Void Damage for all attacks from equipped weapons when activated.

abilities.name: Grasp Of Lohk
abilities.description: Void Tendrils steal weapons from nearby enemies to use as your own floating, auto-targeting armament. Damage output increases based on enemy level. The number of weapons grabbed also determines the damage multiplier for The Lost: Deny's Void beam.

abilities.name: The Lost
abilities.description: Cycle through a trio of lost Warframe powers. Accuse manifests a Void fissure to corrupt enemies into allies. Gaze grasps targets in Void tendrils that capture damage and inflict it when the target is released. Deny annihilates with a beam of Void energy, wiping Sentient resistances.

abilities.name: The Vast Untime
abilities.description: Temporarily shed the outer pieces of Xaku in a destructive blast, then stalk the battlefield in a new, swifter skeletal form. Enemies damaged by the body shrapnel are rendered weaker to <DT_RADIANT_COLOR>Void Damage. Xaku's other active abilities' duration is frozen in time and resumes once The Vast Untime expires.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Yareli/Yareli.passiveDescription: Yareli gains +|CHANCE|% Critical Chance for Secondary weapons when she has been moving for at least |TIME|s.

abilities.name: Sea Snares
abilities.description:
Form five water globules that seek out enemies and expand on contact, simultaneously damaging and immobilizing their victims.
Enemies hit by the globules take increased damage from all sources.

abilities.name: Merulina
abilities.description: Summon Merulina, a rideable creature of the waves, and the inspiration for K-Driving. Merulina protects Yareli by absorbing a large portion of incoming damage.

abilities.name: Aquablades
abilities.description: Tear through foes with a trio of orbiting aquatic blades.

abilities.name: Riptide
abilities.description: Drag enemies into a crushing maelstrom and then blow them away in a watery burst. Each enemy trapped in the vortex increases the burst's damage.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Yareli/YareliPrime.name: Yareli Prime

/Lotus/Powersuits/Tengu/Tengu.name: Zephyr
/Lotus/Powersuits/Tengu/Tengu.passiveDescription: Zephyr moves faster and falls slower while airborne. Also gain |CRIT|% Critical Hit chance with weapons while airborne.

abilities.name: Tail Wind
abilities.description: Hold while airborne to hover Zephyr with reduced movement. From the air, tap to dash forward, or aim down to dive bomb enemies below.

abilities.name: Airburst
abilities.description: Launch a burst of massively dense air. Hold to send enemies flying, tap to pull them toward the burst. Damage increases per enemy hit.

abilities.name: Turbulence
abilities.description: Creates a wind shield around Zephyr, redirecting all incoming projectiles.

abilities.name: Tornado
abilities.description: Create deadly tornadoes that seek out and engulf enemies. Tornadoes deal the elemental Damage Type they absorb the most. Shoot engulfed enemies to inflict extra damage. Hold for stationary tornadoes or tap for wandering ones.
